ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., TRXC) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the stock belongs */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was first offered to the public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock this price entry belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price entry */,
  "open_avg" REAL /* Average opening price */,
  "open_max" REAL /* Maximum opening price */,
  "open_min" REAL /* Minimum opening price */,
  "open_volatility" REAL /* Opening price volatility */,
  "open_change" REAL /* Change in opening price */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the given date */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock this indicator belongs to */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator (e.g., Moving Average, Volatility) */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of technical indicator */,
  "indicator_period" INTEGER /* Period over which the indicator is calculated */,
  "indicator_date" TEXT /* Date when the indicator was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock this prediction belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the stock */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model used */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_type" TEXT /* Type of prediction (e.g., short-term, long-term) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the analyst (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the analyst */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the analyst belongs */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the analyst was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst accessing the stock */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the analyst (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_access_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_access_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the team belongs */,
  "team_lead" TEXT /* Lead analyst of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team this member belongs to */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who is a member of the team */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the analyst joined the team */,
  "role_in_team" TEXT /* Role of the analyst within the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Stock to which the report is related */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
